Operating Driver Movement

What actually moved MoM, not just the total score

Strategic Readout

What matters: RSAT is 64.8% in the selected view. Biggest MoM gain is Enough Orders (+18.4 pp); weakest movement is On-Time Delivery (+2.6 pp). Top open-text pressure area is Pricing & Earnings.

What Correlates Most With RSAT?

Pearson correlation; directional where sample is small

Correlation Readout

Strongest relationship in current view: Earnings Satisfaction with RSAT (r=0.68). Use this to prioritize operating levers, not as proof of causality.
Driver / BehaviorCorrelation with RSATStrength
Earnings Satisfaction0.68Strong
Enough Orders0.61Strong
Safety Support0.56Medium
Salary Clarity0.54Medium
3PL Support0.52Medium
Issue Support0.5Medium
Shift Availability0.42Medium
Orders per Online Hour0.24Weak / directional
Delivered Orders0.21Weak / directional
Delivered Tasks0.21Weak / directional
Avg Hours / Day0.1Weak / directional
Valid Day Rate0.09Weak / directional

Topics riders raised in open comments; click a bar to filter rider voice examples

Prompted Experience Pain Points

Average score from direct survey questions; lower score = larger operating gap
